subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Akbar! The Wronged One of the horizons, in this Most Great Prison, hath turned toward thee and maketh mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر مظلوم آفاق در این سجن اعظم بتو اقبال نموده و ترا ذکر مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for protection, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings
